query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS webhook_configs_crm (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  url TEXT NOT NULL,
  secret VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  events VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'paused', 'failed') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  max_retries INT DEFAULT 3 NOT NULL,
  retry_delay_seconds INT DEFAULT 300 NOT NULL,
  headers JSON DEFAULT '{}',
  last_triggered_at BIGINT,
  failure_count INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000)
);
